name: Bill Russell
description: American music historian and modernist composer (1905–1992)
abstract: William Russell (February 26, 1905 – August 9, 1992) was an American music historian and modernist composer. Named Russell William Wagner at birth, when he decided to become a classical music composer, he dropped his last name—as it already "was taken" by Richard Wagner.

interviews.title: Betty Lee Hanson, Joe James, George Lewis, Joe Lewis, Joe Butler, Kid Thomas Valentine, Bill Russell, Allan Jaffe, Sandra Jaffe Interview, 1961-11-25
